visual_summary: Lens demo component is a zoomable image viewer, typically used when a developer wants to show off an image with a high zoom level. It can be used in a hero section or a product showcase page. The component has a lens that focuses on a specific area of an image, allowing users to zoom in and out of the image.
generation_prompt: Create a production-ready card component with the following characteristics: Name: Lens Demo Description: Lens demo component is a zoomable image viewer, typically used when a developer wants to show off an image with a high zoom level. It can be used in a hero section or a product showcase page. The component has a lens that focuses on a specific area of an image, allowing users to zoom in and out of the image. Style: dark, minimal Interactions: hover, clickable Tags: image, gallery, zoom Requirements: - Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS - Uses Tailwind CSS for styling - Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation - Responsive and mobile-friendly - No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary - Include all necessary imports - Export as default with sensible prop types Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
